notes: Editable dealer source for the public dealer locator. Add, remove, or update dealer objects as dealership coverage changes. Leave unavailable fields as an empty string or 'Available on request'.

dealerSchema.name: Dealer / firm name
dealerSchema.region: North / Central / East / West / South India
dealerSchema.address: Full address or Available on request
dealerSchema.phone: Phone number or Available on request
dealerSchema.googleMapsUrl: Google Maps place/search URL when available
